The gig list

Find this month's Vancouver jazz gigs and live music venues with Rhythm Changes.

Listings

Vancouver jazz calendar | BC, Canada. Jump to today

Week 1 (Sun, Mar 1-Sat, Mar 7)
Week 2 (Sun, Mar 8-Sat, Mar 14)
Week 3 (Sun, Mar 15-Sat, Mar 21)
Week 4 (Sun, Mar 22-Sat, Mar 28)
Week 5 (Sun, Mar 29-Tue, Mar 31)

Get the Free Weekly

The week's upcoming shows, sent to you by email + new stories about artists, events, and recordings.

Email sent! Check your inbox to complete your signup.

You get it on Tuesdays, 6:00 AM Pacific Time. Unsubscribe any time.

Week 1

Sun, Mar 1 - Sat, Mar 7 (back to top)

Sunday, March 1

  • 2:00 PM - Hero's Welcome, Jazz jam with host Matt Franceschini Trio (no cover)
  • 2:00 PM - VIFF Centre, (Early show) The Adventures of Prince Achmed live scored by Gordon Grdina & Hamin Honari ($20+)
  • 2:00 PM - White Rock Royal Canadian Legion 240, Arnie & His Rhythm ($12 cash)
  • 3:00 PM - Evergreen Cultural Centre, Pacific Symphonic Wind Ensemble: Changing Times ($14+)
  • 4:00 PM - St. Andrew's-Wesley United Church, Jazz Vespers ft. Christie Grace Quartet w/ Chris Gestrin, Conrad Good, & Buff Allen (by donation)
  • 6:00 PM - The American, Ruthie Ha Big Band w/ Ayden Landsman, Jocelyn Waugh, John Korsrud, Jack Lee, Tamas Balai, Nicholas Wise, John Nicholson, Erika Chow, Sofia Avelino, Cam Henderon, Casey Thomas-Burns, Ricardo Galvez, George McNally, Dean Thiessen, David Caballero, Chris Fraser, & Todd Stewart ($22.63)
  • 6:15 PM - 2nd Floor Gastown, Joel Faulkner Trio w/ Dave Marfleet & Molly Moolman ($12)
  • 7:00 PM - Meo Chinatown, Arvind Ramdas Trio (no cover)
  • 7:30 PM - Flamingo Room, Alvin Brendan Trio ($6/set)
  • 7:30 PM - VIFF Centre, (Second show) The Adventures of Prince Achmed live scored by Gordon Grdina & Hamin Honari ($20+)
  • 7:30 PM - Boteco Brasil, Brejera ($7)
  • 8:00 PM - Frankie's, Andy Milne w/ Jodi Proznick & Joe Poole ($23.49+)
  • 8:00 PM - Moberly Arts Centre, Tatsuya Nakatani ($27.96)
  • 9:00 PM - Guilt & Co., Lache Cercel ($12)

Monday, March 2

  • 7:00 PM - District Bar Restaurant, Ardeshir Pourkeramati (no cover)
  • 9:00 PM - Guilt & Co., Harrison Ivaz Organ Quartet ($12)

  • 6:30 PM - Shadbolt Centre, Jazz jam (no cover)
  • 7:00 PM - Meo Chinatown, Jonny Tobin Trio w/ Alex Dobson & Trent Otter (no cover)
  • 7:00 PM - UNIT/PITT Gallery, rebsha: Feven Kidane & Nebyu Yohannes ($10/PWYC)

Wednesday, March 4

  • 6:00 PM - La Fabrique St-George, Harrison Ivaz Organ Trio w/ Jason de Couto & Wes Anderson (no cover)
  • 6:00 PM - Provence Marinaside, Gary Comeau & Adam Rohrlick (no cover)
  • 7:00 PM - Frankie's, Wednesdays / Wine / Weeds ft. Cory Weeds Quartet w/ Tilden Webb, David Caballero, & Graham Villette ($8.49+)
  • 8:00 PM - Brentwood Presbyterian Church, Jazz Evensong ft. Trumpet 1 & 2: Feven Kidane & Rory Hislop (by donation)
  • 8:00 PM - LanaLou's, Gander Jam: improvised/groove open jam (by donation)
  • 8:00 PM - Sylvia Hotel, Soda Crackers (no cover)

Thursday, March 5

  • 6:15 PM - 2nd Floor Gastown, Julia Skye & Colin Sankey ($12)
  • 7:00 PM - Apollo's, Lucas Dubovik Trio w/ Dan Howard & Wes Anderson ($5)
  • 7:00 PM - Guilt & Co., Ben Kyle ($8+)
  • 7:00 PM - Moose's Down Under, Jazz jam with host Cameron Hood Trio w/ Jillian Lebeck & Joe Poole ($10 / no cover for jammers)
  • 7:30 PM - Boteco Brasil, Shiggy Bossa Nova ft. Brad Shigeta ($7)
  • 8:00 PM - Frankie's, Carl Mayotte ($23.49+)
  • 8:00 PM - Tyrant Studios, Henriques Ryshpan Quartet: David Ryshpan, Ben Henriques, David Caballero, & Arvind Ramdas ($19.50)
  • 10:00 PM - Tyrant Studios, Jazz jam with host Arvind Ramdas ($10/PWYC for jammers)

Today

Friday, March 6

  • 6:00 PM - Royal Canadian Legion Branch #133 Port Coquitlam, Jazz Orchestra of the 49th Parallel ($25)
  • 6:15 PM - 2nd Floor Gastown, Joelle Lush Trio w/ Cole Tinney & Gavin Youngash ($12)
  • 7:00 PM - Public Table at Northlands Golf Course North Vancouver, Bella Fedrigo & Nolan Crooks (no cover)
  • 7:00 PM - West Vancouver Memorial Library, Ostara Project (FREE)
  • 7:00 PM - Zameen Art House, Huu Bac Quintet ($20+)
  • 7:30 PM - Pearl, Tortoise + Spacemoth ($47.50)
  • 7:30 PM - Apollo's, Carman J. Price Trio w/ Bill Coon & Darren Radtke ($5)
  • 8:00 PM - Frankie's, Frank Basile w/ Tilden Webb, Conrad Good, & Jesse Cahill ($28.49+)
  • 9:30 PM - Tyrant Studios, Sars-Barrett Bros. Quintet: Tim Sars, Nathan Barrett, Alex Flock, Russell Sholberg, & Seth Kitamura ($21.50)
  • 11:00 PM - Frankie's, Dom Hallberg plays Wes Montgomery w/ Dean Thiessen, Riley Poystila, & Kate Johnson ($10)

Saturday, March 7

  • 2:00 PM - La Fabrique St-George, Tamas Balai Trio w/ David Caballero & Wes Anderson (no cover)
  • 3:30 PM - Brentwood Presbyterian Church, Jazzillion to benefit The Underwear Project: John Whyte, Laura Iwan, Lucas Burrows, Dave Crawley, Max Todd, & Evan Leung (by donation)
  • 4:00 PM - Gigi Blin East Cafe Marpole, Jazz jam (no cover)
  • 7:00 PM - Gigi Blin East Cafe Marpole, Jimi James Fraser Quintet ($15)
  • 7:30 PM - Apollo's, Harrison Ivaz Trio w/ Jake McIntyre-Paul & Arvind Ramdas ($5)
  • 7:30 PM - Chan Centre, Dominique Fils-Aimé ($59+)
  • 7:30 PM - Kay Meek Centre, Sister Jazz Orchestra plays Joni Michell, dir. Christian Morrison. ft. Jennifer Scott, arrangements by Jill Townsend, Dean Thiessen, Andrew Homzy, & Christian Morrison, w/ Ingrid Stitt, Julia Nolan, Karen Graves, Caley Honeywell, Jennifer Vance, Ellen Marple, Robin MacLulich, Janine King, Hayley Bennett, Jocelyn Waugh, Geeta Das, Heather Anderson, Melissa Hammer, Bonnie Northgraves, Madeleine Elkins, Shannon Thue, Bella Fedrigo, & Jamie Lee ($29+)
  • 7:30 PM - Odd Fellows Hall, Rockin' for a good cause 60's dance ft. The Unmentionables + Lulu and her Handsome Men + The Appetizers, to benefit Three Links Foundation ($25 door)
  • 8:00 PM - Frankie's, Frank Basile w/ Tilden Webb, Conrad Good, & Jesse Cahill ($28.49+)
  • 11:00 PM - Frankie's, Adam Robert Thomas Trio w/ Conrad Good & Jesse Cahill ($10)

Sun, Mar 29 - Tue, Mar 31 (back to top)

  • 4:00 PM - The Hargrove, Sammy K DJ set + Art exhibition ft. Sarah Nash Wong, Joy Mullen, Travis Kirton, XEL, & Gordy Li (RSVP)
  • 4:00 PM - Painted Ship, Terminal City Brass Band ($5)
  • 4:00 PM - St. Andrew's United Church North Vancouver, Jazz Vespers ft. Double Vibes (by donation)
  • 4:00 PM - St. Andrew's-Wesley United Church, Jazz Vespers ft. Leora Cashe Quartet (by donation)
  • 5:00 PM - The Hargrove, Bahar Khazei & XEL + Mauricio Pauly solo ($11.98)
  • 7:00 PM - Meo Chinatown, Taras Luka Trio (no cover)
  • 7:00 PM - VIFF Centre, Midnight Boogaloo + Salón México screening ($35)
  • 7:30 PM - Flamingo Room, Maria Gabrielle Trio ($6/set)
  • 8:00 PM - Frankie's, Russ Botten, Tony Foster, & Joe Poole play Ray Brown ($23.49+)
  • 8:00 PM - The Hargrove, Lost Dog Sundays ft. LETTR OPENR: Feven Kidane, Nebyu Yohannes, Cole Schmidt, & Kevin Romain + Mustafa Rafiq / Cat Toren / Tommy Babin / Dan Gaucher + Erin Leigh comedy set ($17.31)
  • 9:00 PM - Guilt & Co., Latin Music Sundays ft. Forró do Cana ($12)

Monday, March 30

  • 7:00 PM - District Bar Restaurant, Ardeshir Pourkeramati (no cover)
  • 7:00 PM - Frankie's, UBC Jazz Ensemble dir. Jim Hopson ($23.49+)
  • 7:00 PM - Guilt & Co., Alex Flock solo ($8+)
  • 7:00 PM - Meo Chinatown, Marcus Abramzik Trio (no cover)
  • 9:00 PM - Guilt & Co., Alvin Brendan Trio ($12)
